segment.source: Renders a slim full-width bar with one short required message, optional smaller supporting text, an optional link, and three style variants (default, accent, outline); the heading stays screen-reader-only. Use it for: launch or event announcements, limited-time offers, maintenance or holiday notices, deadlines that must top the page. Prefer 'Utility Bar' for contact and service links, 'Inline Alert Notice' for messages inside content, 'Floating CTA Bar' for a sticky conversion bar.
